meaning: adj.[医] 糖尿病的n.糖尿病患者
examples: He was diagnosed (as) a diabetic when he was 64.
Diabetic neuropathy is damage to the nerves as a result of diabetes, and affects up to 50% of people with diabetes.
He found her in a diabetic coma.
Satisfied that Microcyn was effective and nontoxic, the institute tested the solution on patients with diabetic foot ulcers.
This drug is approved for macular degeneration and is in testing for diabetic eye disease.
